https://openminds.om-i.org/props/apexAng._instruction: Enter the angle at the apex between the two equal sides of this isosceles triangle.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/apexAng.label: Apex angle
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/apexAng.name: apexAngle

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/legLeng._instruction: Enter the common length of the two equal sides meeting at the apex of this isosceles triangle.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/legLeng.label: Leg length
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/legLeng.name: legLength
